flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wittenberg University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($29.3k → $34.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Wittenberg University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (53.8% vs 65.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wittenberg University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
